title: Usopp Is Hurt
description: Luffy has to decide the Going Merry’s future while Usopp’s anger and grief make the choice unbearable.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Luffy, Usopp, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. Luffy has to decide the Going Merry’s future while Usopp’s anger and grief make the choice unbearable.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Everyone was so happy just this morning...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And we still don't know Nico Robin's whereabouts...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The whole group is falling apart...

dialogue.speaker: Usoppp
dialogue.text: Don't come down, all of you!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Go inside if you can't watch.

summary: Luffy has to decide the Going Merry’s future while Usopp’s anger and grief make the choice unbearable.
